prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-JAROPENER-BJ094 Product Type: KITCHEN_TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Rubber 4 in 1 Non Slip Multipurpose Adjustable Easy Grip Jar Opener Tool Description: Have you ever been stuck trying to open a stubborn pickle jar? Or, you're riffling through utensil drawers but just can't find that bottle opener? Worry no more, the Beille jar opener can do all that with the quick twist of a wrist. With the Beille 4 in 1 Non-Slip Multipurpose Adjustable Easy Grip Jar Opener kitchen gadget, you can open a variety of lid sizes with just one device.

To use, simply place the correct size jar opener size on the lid you're trying to open, twist, and watch the lid pop open. What makes the jar opener or bottle opener so easy to use? Read on.

Constructed from strong TPR rubber, this jar opener will stand up to and lend a helping hand with many cooking and baking sessions to come.

-Abrasion and chemical resistant, the jar opener provides high impact strength to open the toughest lids
-The non-slip grip ensures that the gripper will never slide off the bottle, container, or jar you are trying to open
-The raised grip design provides even more leverage when trying to open stubborn jars

The rubber construction material provides excellent grip and is a great kitchen tool for those with arthritis, hand injuries, or a lack of hand strength.

This adjustable easy grip jar opener makes removing all kinds of lids fast and efficient. When that pickle jar lid is just too tight or you can't locate a bottle opener, use the Beille gripper tool to clamp down on any jar, can, or bottle for quick access to food and drinks with minimal effort. Search Terms: jar openers can bottle opener for weak hands seniors arthritis kitchen gadgets rubber hand grip tools cooking utensils essentials silicone Features: - KITCHEN GADGET ESSENTIAL: This adjustable easy grip jar opener makes removing all kinds of lids fast and efficient! When that pickle jar lid is just too tight or you can't locate a bottle opener, use the Beille gripper tool to clamp down on any jar, can or bottle for quick access to food and drinks - 4 IN 1 JAR OPENER: Featuring four different grip sizes, the Beille rubber jar opener or bottle opener can tackle tight plastic or glass jars, mason jar lids and bottles too! You can use the kitchen gadget on 1.5, 2, 2.25 and 3 inch lids - DURABLE RUBBER DESIGN: Constructed from strong TPR rubber, this jar opener will stand up to many cooking and baking sessions in your kitchen! Abrasion and chemical resistant, the jar opener provides high impact strength to open the toughest lids; the gadget also features raised grips that give the jar opener even more leverage against those tight lids - ARTHRITUS FRIENDLY: Easy to use, simply fit the jar opener over the lid, grip and twist; the rubber handle provides excellent grip and is a great kitchen tool for those with arthritis, hand injuries or lack of hand strength - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 inch (L); Material: TPR Rubber; Color: Red/Grey; Grip Diameters: 1.5, 2, 2.25 and 3 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
